text.title: HIPAA BAA Vendor Checklist Core Rules
text.summary: 8 testable rules with rationale + source for hipaa-baa-vendor-checklist. Includes terminal skip-this-methodology rule.

rule.statement: Every vendor touching PHI MUST have a signed BAA on file before any PHI is shared; the BAA MUST be countersigned and dated.
rule.rationale: 45 CFR 164.504(e) HIPAA BAA — applies to HIPAA BAA Vendor Checklist.

rule.statement: Checklist MUST include a current data-flow diagram showing every PHI surface the vendor touches; unmapped surfaces block the engagement.
rule.rationale: HIPAA Security Rule risk analysis — applies to HIPAA BAA Vendor Checklist.

rule.statement: BAA MUST require the vendor to notify the covered entity of any PHI breach within 60 calendar days (and contractually narrowed to 72 hours where possible).
rule.rationale: 45 CFR 164.410 — applies to HIPAA BAA Vendor Checklist.

rule.statement: Vendor MUST disclose every sub-processor handling PHI; the covered entity reserves the right to object before a new sub-processor is onboarded.
rule.rationale: HIPAA + GDPR convergence — applies to HIPAA BAA Vendor Checklist.

rule.statement: BAA MUST grant the covered entity audit rights with reasonable notice — at least annually or after a security incident.
rule.rationale: HIPAA Security Rule + best practice — applies to HIPAA BAA Vendor Checklist.

rule.statement: BAA MUST require return or certified destruction of PHI on contract termination; if infeasible, contractual protections extend post-termination.
rule.rationale: 45 CFR 164.504(e)(2)(ii)(J) — applies to HIPAA BAA Vendor Checklist.

rule.statement: Vendor MUST encrypt PHI at rest and in transit using NIST-approved algorithms (FIPS 140-2 / 140-3).
rule.rationale: HIPAA Security Rule + NIST SP 800-111 — applies to HIPAA BAA Vendor Checklist.

rule.statement: If no PHI is in scope or HIPAA does not apply to the engagement, return `skipped`.
rule.rationale: Methodology applicability — applies to HIPAA BAA Vendor Checklist.
